visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen arrangement. On the top-left, a foreign woman with black hair in a bun and a floral top is shown eating colorful ribbon-shaped candies. On the right, the main Asian female creator with long brown hair and a white shirt watches the clip with a look of extreme curiosity and surprise while holding a green stick. (2) The scene shifts to the main creator sitting on a beige bed, wearing a vibrant pink cardigan. She is holding a small white Maltese dog on her lap. A silver laptop is visible in front of her. A digital screen overlay appears, displaying a Korean online shopping interface with various candy products and prices. (3) The creator holds two rectangular boxes of 'Ribbon Candy' in red and green colors toward the camera. She stands in a bright indoor room with neutral wall tones. She opens the green box to reveal the green and white striped candy packed in a transparent plastic container, showing her excited facial expression. (4) A close-up shot captures the green ribbon candy, which appears fractured and broken within its tray. The creator is shown in a small inset frame, covering her mouth with her hands in a state of shock. Large, colorful text overlays in Korean and Chinese appear on the screen to emphasize her speechless reaction. (5) The creator picks up a large piece of the green ribbon candy and attempts to bite it. Her face shows significant effort and strain as she tries to chew the hard texture. A graphic overlay of a Lotte Green Grape candy bag appears as she compares the flavors. The small white dog watches her closely from the side. (6) In the final phase, the creator tries the red, white, and green striped cherry-flavored candy. She continues her review, speaking directly to the lens with expressive gestures. She holds the candy packaging up one last time while explaining the price and size before the video ends in the same bright indoor setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 海外網紅都在吃這個？ [Slogan]: 蝴蝶結糖果. (2) [Subtitle]: 蝴蝶結樣子的塑膠？ (3) [Subtitle]: 原來是糖果？！ (4) [Logo]: Robyn. (5) [Variety]: 實驗歐膩. (6) [Subtitle]: 為了找那個回韓國. (7) [Subtitle]: （你又要一個人吃東西？）. (8) [Subtitle]: 在韓國賣場找看看. (9) [Subtitle]: 發現韓國也能網購而且要等蠻久... (10) [Subtitle]: 但是呢 我去韓國便利商店的時候 發現有蝴蝶結糖果. (11) [Subtitle]: 好像兩個口味不一樣. (12) [Subtitle]: 我要先來試試看香印葡萄口味的~. (13) [Logo]: Twisted. (14) [Variety]: 慌張. (15) [Variety]: (真是無言). (16) [Subtitle]: 這個真的不能斷的啦. (17) [Subtitle]: 哇 哇 全步破碎了. (18) [Subtitle]: 你覺得怎麼樣？ (19) [Variety]: (三小..?). (20) [Subtitle]: 反正先吃看看吧！ (21) [Variety]: 卡茲. (22) [Subtitle]: 可是有點... 咬不下去啊！ (23) [Subtitle]: 那個西洋女生到底怎麼咬下去？ (24) [Subtitle]: 她牙齒用黃金做嗎. (25) [Logo]: Lotte. [Subtitle]: 韓國有一個青葡萄糖果 跟那個味道一模一樣！ (26) [Subtitle]: 櫻桃口味. (27) [Subtitle]: 這個到底怎麼咬啊？ (28) [Subtitle]: 好像第一個剛好破碎了 所以吃得比較方便. (29) [Subtitle]: 完整樣子的糖果更不容易咬！！ (30) [Subtitle]: 味道比起來青葡萄更好吃！ (31) [Subtitle]: 在韓國買 40NT 左右. (32) [Subtitle]: 真的一大個 我覺得可以吃大概兩三天 份量蠻大的 我現在還在舔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 1 foreign female in the secondary video clip.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is an Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a white inner shirt and a bright pink button-up cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor bedroom with a beige quilted headboard and white walls; also includes a digital interface of a Korean shopping website.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-tempo, bright BGM featuring a steady electronic drum beat. A foreign woman's voice says 'All right' and 'Awesome' amidst the sound of intense, resonant crunching SFX. The primary Asian female speaker lets out a sharp, high-pitched gasp of surprise in Korean. (2) A sharp transition whoosh leads into the main creator's fast-paced, enthusiastic narration. A single, high-pitched dog bark punctuates the background. The BGM maintains a consistent melodic loop with playful synth bells. The ambient noise floor is extremely low, highlighting the clarity of the voice. (3) Mechanical clicking sounds and paper rustling SFX occur as a box is opened. The creator's voice exhibits high arousal and excitement. The BGM remains energetic, and the speech-to-music ratio is well-balanced, ensuring the narration remains the primary focus of the mix. (4) A comic 'ding' SFX and a descending melodic stinger accentuate a moment of disappointment as the broken candy is discovered. The creator's vocal tone shifts to an exaggeratedly sad and uncertain pitch, with audible vocal tension. The sound design clearly highlights her emotional reaction. (5) Heavy, percussive biting and snapping SFX take center stage as the creator tries to chew the candy. These sounds are recorded with high spectral brightness, making the crunching feel very close to the listener. Her speech becomes slightly muffled and strained while she is chewing. (6) The video concludes with more loud crunching SFX and a final sequence of animated talking. The creator's speech rate remains high and the tone professional yet casual. The BGM fades out with a final electronic flourish, leaving a clean tail of indoor room tone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Investigation -> Discovery -> Tasting -> Evaluation -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review a trending 'Ribbon Candy' product by comparing a viral international clip with the creator's own experience of finding and eating it in South Korea, highlighting the candy's unique shape and surprisingly hard texture.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is structured as a personal vlog and reaction/review of a trending product purchased by the creator.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high editing density and variety-show style subtitles to maintain engagement. The presence of the dog and the comparison to common supermarket items adds a relatable, lifestyle vlog quality.
